title: Unstable SMP Death Sounds by BL
description: Makes every death have the wither spawn sound [unstable SMP's death sound]
body:
# Unstable SMP Death Sounds
🎮 Overview
---
Unstable SMP Death Sounds is a lightweight client-side Fabric mod for Minecraft 1.21.x that enhances SMP gameplay by adding an intense audio reaction to player deaths.

Whenever a death message appears in chat, the mod plays the iconic Wither spawn sound, making every kill, accident, or chaotic moment feel more impactful without changing any gameplay mechanics.

⚙️ How It Works
---
The mod listens to incoming chat and system messages on your client. When a standard Minecraft death message is detected, it triggers a sound effect locally.

It recognizes common death events like slain, drowned, fell, exploded, and other vanilla death types, then instantly plays the Wither spawn sound for feedback.

🌐 Compatibility
---
✔ Works on most multiplayer SMP servers
✔ No server-side installation required
✔ Fully client-side Fabric mod
✔ Minecraft 1.21.x support

As long as death messages are visible in chat, the mod functions normally across servers.

💀 Death Detection Coverage
---
⚔️ PvP kills (slain, killed)
🏹 Projectile deaths (shot, impaled)
💥 Explosions (TNT, creepers, crystals)
🔥 Fire and lava deaths
🌊 Drowning and suffocation
🌍 Falling and void deaths
❄️ Environmental effects (freezing, crushing, etc.)
⚡ Special damage sources (magic, lightning, wither, etc.)

🔊 Sound Feature
---
The mod plays the Wither spawn sound whenever a valid death message is detected. This creates a consistent audio cue for all player deaths you can see in chat, adding extra intensity to SMP moments.

🧠 Performance
---
The mod is extremely lightweight and runs entirely on chat event detection. It does not modify world logic, entities, or server behavior, making it safe and efficient for regular gameplay.

⚠️DISCLAIMER!!! 
---
This mod is a fan-made project and is not officially affiliated with or endorsed by ParrotX2, Spoke, Wemmbu, FlameFrags, or the Unstable SMP.

All credit for the original Unstable SMP concept, content, and server belongs entirely to them. This mod is simply inspired by that SMP. All credits to them for it
